ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Disturbution Of The Reserve.
Off Calendar May-25-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Disturbution Of The Reserve.
Off Calendar May-04-2021 Continued To May-25-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Disturbution Of The Reserve.
Off Calendar Feb-09-2021 Continued To May-04-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Wade appeared by zoom for Charmaine Price.

The Court stated that there is still $8,000.00 that has not been distributed and questions what's the delay. Mr. Wade stated that his Client wanted to verify with her Accountant that there are no more taxes due, and that Ms. Price is ready to do distribution, but the trouble was that the Husband lives in a remote area of South Africa. Status on distribution of the reserve is continued to May 4, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-13-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Inventory And Appraisal Or Partial Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Dec-11-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-11-2019 Continued To Jan-13-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Wade appeared by telephone for Charmaine Price.

Mr. Wade stated that the inventory that was filed is in fact a final inventory, but an incorrect box was checked, that he filed a status report, that he is waiting for his Client to call with final account balances and that they are ready to close the estate. The Court informed Mr. Wade that he will have to file an amended inventory and appraisal, and that the status report was submitted for e-filing on November 1st, but it was rejected. Status on close of estate is continued to January 13, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration and an amended/corrected inventory and appraisal. Mr. Wade is to have said documents on file by January 6, 2020.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-04-2019 Continued To Dec-11-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
David Wade for Charmaine Price via Court Call.

Mr. Wade stated he filed a status report electronically on Friday which was rejected because he put today's hearing date and that the issue with the Inventory and Appraisal will be detailed in the status report. Mr. Wade explained that the Inventory and Appraisal was done but when the client looked it over, thought the numbers looked off, that they discovered the statement provided were off, and will file it in the next few days. The Court noted that in addition to getting his documents filed he must provide courtesy copies, and it will consider suspending administration if at least a partial Inventory and Appraisal is not filed by December 11, 2019. The status on close of estate is continued to December 11, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration and Inventory and Appraisal.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-09-2019 Continued To Nov-04-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Wade appeared by telephone for Petitioner.

The Court stated that an inventory and appraisal is needed. Mr. Wade stated that his Client is out of State quite a bit, that he is waiting on one last account statement from his Client, that he would prefer to have all of the information rather than doing a partial inventory and that once they do the inventory, they will be ready to close the estate. Status on close of estate is continued to November 4, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of the inventory and appraisal, and for filing of a petition for final distribution. Mr. Wade is to have his documents filed by October 28, 2019.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
